2234040.name: 曦LostGirl English complete Edition
2234040.description:
In the dark, the girl seems to have returned to her early time, On her way escape, monsters and unknown space trapped her... She wanna escape, but the end comes before her leaving...

This English complete Edition contains no texts or plots update,but it's the final version, English version will continue update in here

Here's what the DLC looks like：
1.Updated some of the playing method ，a turn-based combat system, several enemies can be challenged
2.Redo some UI, The game interface is more comfortable
3.Added two hidden protagonist costumes that require a second entry into the maze to obtain
4.Added some items

Note:
The DLC is not universal with the primary game's saves
DLC is currently only available in English now, Chinese version will be a moment later
